body_txt: The ability to perceive normally invisible Life Energy of others, often colour-coded for good/evil , emotions , amount of life, Power Levels , etc. Often presented as an advanced form of Ki Manipulation , but can also be attributed to Functional Magic , Psychic Powers , spirituality , or sufficiently advanced technology. Auras can be seen as a glowing outline or coloring on a character's skin. For extra clarity, the character/ Monster of the Week 's vision may be shown in black and white to make the auras more distinctive. Super-Trope of Detect Evil . Sister Trope of Enemy Scan and The Force Is Strong with This One . When the Aura is representative of something else, see Editorial Synaesthesia , Power Glows , Fluorescent Footprints or Battle Aura . Compare to Vein-o-Vision , which shows the heart rate and blood pumping inside a body. Not to be confused with actual auras, which are visual or neurological aberrations that occur before the onset of a migraine. For other information displays within a person's field of view, see Heads-Up Display , Stat-O-Vision , Killing Intent and Infrared X-Ray Camera .
